.github/workflows/maven-publish.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 17 for the Maven Central repository setup job.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 17 instead of Java 11 for the build environment.

core/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace removed javax.annotation module in Java 17.
core/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and fully deprecated; code using @Generated or other javax annotations will fail to compile or run without an explicit dependency on the Jakarta replacement.

maven-plugin/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmn.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 11+ compatibility.
Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 11+ compatibility.

plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.general_idea: Replace legacy instanceof check with pattern matching to extract the variable directly.
plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.before:
if (element instanceof Rule) {
            return prettify((Rule) element);
plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.after:
if (element instanceof Rule rule) {
            return prettify(rule);

plugin-base/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnc.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for more concise string interpolation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may fail to compile code targeting Java 17 or lack support for the `--release` flag behavior required for JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions cannot instrument or analyze classes compiled for Java 17, leading to runtime errors during test coverage execution.

server/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace the removed javax.annotation module in Java 17.
server/pom.xml.why_exists: java.lang.NoClassDefFoundError or compile error for javax.annotation classes (e.g., @Generated, @PostConstruct) which were removed from the JDK in Java 11 and fully deprecated/removed in Java 17, requiring the explicit Jakarta dependency.

server/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/.general_idea: Replace manual cast after instanceof check with pattern matching variable declaration.
server/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/.after:
if (elementInstance instanceof DrgElement element) {
            return element;

validators/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace removed javax.annotation module in Java 17.
validators/pom.xml.why_exists: NoClassDefFoundError or compile error for javax.annotation types (e.g., @Generated, @PostConstruct) which were removed from the JDK in Java 11 and fully deprecated/removed in Java 17, requiring the explicit Jakarta dependency.

validators/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnch.general_idea: Refactor instanceof checks to use pattern matching for cleaner variable extraction.
validators/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnch.after: if (sourceElement instanceof Decision sourceDecision && targetElement instanceof Decision targetDecision) {

validators/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnch.general_idea: Replace the manual filter-and-map pattern for Optional with the more concise flatMap(Optional::stream) idiom introduced in Java 9.

validators/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnch.general_idea: Replace string concatenation with text blocks for multi-line string literals.
validators/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnch.before: final String expectedErrorMessage = "Could not parse '[1..': line 1, column 5:\n" + "INTEGER, DECIMAL, booleanfragment, variablefragment, stringfragment or date and time(\" expected, EOF encountered.";
